reviews.comment:
Anoche 06/10/2024 entre la 01:20/ 01:30am fui a cargar nafta, tardaron un montón en atender, el playero que me atendió se puso a boludear charlando con su compañero y terminó cargándome el doble de nafta de la que yo pedí, le avisé 3 veces y no me dió bola, encima de que el error fue suyo me hizo pagar la nafta extra de mi bolsillo y aparte de todo no me quiso hacer el ticket final por más que se lo pedí!! Quiero solución

(Translated by Google)
Last night, October 6, 2024, between 1:20 and 1:30 AM, I went to get gas. The service took forever. The attendant who helped me started messing around chatting with his coworker and ended up giving me twice the amount of gas I asked for. I told him three times, but he ignored me. On top of the fact that it was his mistake, he made me pay for the extra gas out of my own pocket, and to top it all off, he refused to give me a receipt even though I asked for one! I want a solution!

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención en la parte administrativa , no tienen idea de nada , poca información.
Mal trato , muy molesta la señora rubia sentada en el escritorio derecho .
Inoperante maleducada .
Tuvimos que ir la ACÁ central en el 3 piso para poder abonar,  nos pareció raro ya que en años anteriores pudimos pagar en el ACÁ Belgrano .
Perdimos no solo tiempo sino que nos sentimos maltratados.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from the administrative staff; they have no idea what they're doing and provide very little information. The blonde woman sitting at the right-hand desk was very rude and unpleasant. She was incompetent and ill-mannered. We had to go to the main ACA office on the 3rd floor to pay, which seemed strange since in previous years we had been able to pay at the ACA Belgrano branch. We not only wasted time but also felt mistreated.
